fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: G/L Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the account that the entry has been posted to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's posting date.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type that the entry belongs to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's Document No.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger, customer, vendor, or bank account that the balancing entry is posted to, such as a cash account for cash purchases.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Amount of the entry.

fields.name: Source Currency Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source currency amount for general ledger entries.

fields.name: Source Currency VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source currency VAT amount for general ledger entries.

fields.name: Source Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source currency code for general ledger entries.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that was posted on the entry.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is included in the total amount.

fields.name: Business Unit Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Business Unit code of the company from which the entry was consolidated.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Gen. Posting Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that a balancing entry is posted to, such as BANK for a cash account.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's external document number, such as a vendor's invoice number.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source type that applies to the source number that is shown in the Source No. field.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger entry that is posted if you post in an additional reporting currency.

fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the intercompany partner that the transaction is related to if the entry was created from an intercompany transaction.

fields.name: Reversed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry has been part of a reverse transaction (correction) made by the Reverse function.

fields.name: Reversed by Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the correcting entry. If the field Specifies a number, the entry cannot be reversed again.

fields.name: Reversed Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the original entry that was undone by the reverse transaction.

fields.name: G/L Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the account that the entry has been posted to.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the VAT entry. This is either the date that the document was created or posted, depending on your setting on the General Ledger Setup page.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 3, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 4, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 5 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 5, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 6 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 6, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 7 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 7, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 8 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 8, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: FA Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the fixed asset entry.

fields.name: FA Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the fixed asset entry.

fields.name: Non-Deductible VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the transaction for which VAT is not applied, due to the type of goods or services purchased.

fields.name: Src. Curr. Non-Ded. VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in source currency of the transaction for which VAT is not applied, due to the type of goods or services purchased.
